items.briefing:
Telstra is experiencing a mobile outage affecting services across Australia today, which may impact staff who rely on mobile connectivity for work communications. If you're having trouble reaching colleagues or clients via mobile, consider switching to landlines, Wi-Fi calling, or messaging apps as a temporary workaround.

Separately, fraud targeting online platforms is shifting toward harder-to-detect methods involving organic web traffic, a trend flagged across the Asia-Pacific region. This is a reminder to stay alert to unusual account activity or unexpected login attempts.

**Practical tip:** If your mobile service drops unexpectedly, verify outages at your carrier's official website before assuming a security issue.

featured.title: Telstra mobile outage disrupts services across Australia
featured.quote: Major Telstra outage disrupted voice and data services nationwide, affecting millions of Australians.
